manifesto.body: Nutrition should adapt to you, not the other way around. We're building Vēra so your plan evolves with your life — not against it.

chatPreview.title: How Vēra talks to you
chatPreview.userMessage: How am I doing with my macros today?
chatPreview.assistantMessage: You're on track with protein but fats are a little low. Consider adding <0>avocado</0> or <1>nuts</1> to your next meal.

items.title: Static plans
items.description: Diets don't adapt to your daily life, routine changes, or unexpected events.

items.title: Lack of follow-up
items.description: Between appointments with your nutritionist, you have no guidance or feedback.

items.title: Contradictory information
items.description: Miracle diets, myths, and misleading marketing everywhere.

howItWorks.title: Four steps to a nutrition plan
howItWorks.subtitle: Vēra starts by understanding you. Then it builds your plan, adjusts it daily, and reviews with you every week.

steps.title: Initial diagnosis
steps.description: We analyze your profile, goals, history, and food preferences.

steps.title: Personalized plan
steps.description: We create your macro and calorie plan based on nutritional science.

steps.title: Daily adjustments
steps.description: AI redistributes meals when you deviate from the plan.

steps.title: Periodic reviews
steps.description: Weekly and monthly evaluations to optimize your progress.

howItWorks.closing: No rigid diets. No starting over.

benefits.title: Built to
benefits.subtitle: Six principles that separate Vēra from any macro app you've tried before.

items.title: Dynamic plans
items.description: We automatically recalculate calories and macros based on your progress and adherence.

items.title: Smart balance
items.description: Ate too much? Skipped a meal? Vēra redistributes your day.

items.title: Clinical safety
items.description: Safety tools review limits before executing changes.

items.title: Total transparency
items.description: Every adjustment is explained with reasons, expected impact, and undo option.

items.title: With or without nutritionist
items.description: Autonomous mode or as a copilot for your health professional.

items.title: Data-driven
items.description: 17 critical variables monitored for precise decisions.

waitlist.title: Be among the first to
waitlist.subtitle: The beta opens soon. Those who join now get early access and a founder price locked in for life.

perks.title: Early access

perks.title: Founder pricing
perks.description: Special rate locked in for life for waitlist users.

perks.title: Your input shapes the product
perks.description: Direct access to the team and priority on feature feedback.

success.title: You're on the list!

errors.email_exists: This email is already registered on the waitlist.

items.question: Do I need to have a nutritionist?
items.answer: No, it's not necessary. Vēra can work autonomously or as a complement to your current nutritionist. In companion mode, the AI respects the clinical plan and proposes adjustments for professional approval.

items.question: What data does Vēra collect?
items.answer: We collect information about your nutritional profile, goals, weight, adherence, and food preferences. All data is handled with strict privacy and never shared with third parties.

items.question: When does the beta start?
items.answer: We are in active development phase. The first waitlist users will receive access in the coming weeks. We'll notify you by email when your spot is ready.

items.question: Does Vēra replace a health professional?
items.answer: No. Vēra is a support tool that amplifies adherence and follow-up, but does not substitute the judgment of a health professional for specific clinical cases.

footer.tagline: The truth about your nutrition. A plan that learns with you, not against you.
